src: Video, Image and GIF upscale/enlarge(Super-Resolution) and Video frame interpolation. Achieved with Waifu2x,  Real-ESRGAN, Real-CUGAN, RTX Video Super Resolution VSR, SRMD, RealSR, Anime4K, RIFE, IFRNet, CAIN, DAIN,  and ACNet.
ja: 動画・画像・GIFのアップスケール／拡大（超解像）と動画フレーム補間。Waifu2x、Real-ESRGAN、Real-CUGAN、RTX Video Super Resolution VSR、SRMD、RealSR、Anime4K、RIFE、IFRNet、CAIN、DAIN、ACNetで実現。
